meta.title: 命理术语表 - Bazi & Zhouyi Terminology Glossary
meta.description: 面向海外市场的八字命理与周易术语中英对照表，含文化注释
meta.source: 《三命通会》《中国命理学史论》综合整理
meta.target_audience: English-speaking users interested in Chinese metaphysics

八字_BaZi.en: Eight Characters / Four Pillars of Destiny
八字_BaZi.definition: A system of destiny analysis based on the Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches of birth year, month, day, and hour
八字_BaZi.cultural_note: Think of it as a 'cosmic DNA' encoded at your birth moment

正官_ZhengGuan.definition: The Heavenly Stem that restrains the Day Master with opposite yin-yang polarity
正官_ZhengGuan.represents: Career, discipline, husband (for women), rules, social status

七杀_QiSha.definition: The Heavenly Stem that restrains the Day Master with same yin-yang polarity
七杀_QiSha.represents: Pressure, competition, ambition, lover (for women), danger

正印_ZhengYin.definition: The Heavenly Stem that generates the Day Master with opposite polarity

偏印_PianYin.definition: The Heavenly Stem that generates the Day Master with same polarity

正财_ZhengCai.definition: The Heavenly Stem controlled by Day Master with opposite polarity
正财_ZhengCai.represents: Salary, steady income, wife (for men), legitimate wealth

偏财_PianCai.definition: The Heavenly Stem controlled by Day Master with same polarity
偏财_PianCai.represents: Windfall, investment, business income, father, concubine

食神_ShiShen.definition: The Heavenly Stem generated by Day Master with same polarity
食神_ShiShen.positive: Artistic, easygoing, enjoys life, good cook

伤官_ShangGuan.definition: The Heavenly Stem generated by Day Master with opposite polarity
伤官_ShangGuan.represents: Rebellious talent, sharp wit, innovation, criticism

比肩_BiJian.definition: Same Heavenly Stem as Day Master with same polarity

劫财_JieCai.definition: Same Heavenly Stem as Day Master with opposite polarity

天乙贵人_Nobleman.meaning: The most auspicious star - brings benefactors,贵人相助, rescues from danger

桃花咸池_Peach_Blossom.meaning: Rules romance, charm, and sexual attraction. Can bring either beautiful relationships or scandals depending on chart quality
桃花咸池_Peach_Blossom.calculation: 寅午戌见卯, 巳酉丑见午, 申子辰见酉, 亥卯未见子

红鸾_Red_Luan.meaning: Marriage star - indicates timing of marriage and romantic commitment

天喜_Heavenly_Joy.meaning: Celebration star - happy events, weddings, childbirth

孤辰寡宿_Loneliness.meaning: Indicates tendency toward loneliness, late marriage, or emotional distance

羊刃_Ram_Blade.meaning: Extreme strength point - can indicate surgery, violence, or extraordinary willpower

从财格.meaning: Wealth elements dominate, self surrenders to wealth energy

从官格.meaning: Authority elements dominate, self submits to career/discipline

伤官格.meaning: Creative genius with tendency to challenge authority

正官格.meaning: Classic leadership and career success pattern

财官双美.meaning: Perfect balance of wealth and career - most auspicious

夫星_Husband_Star.note: For women: Direct Officer (正官) is the primary husband star, Seven Killings (七杀) is secondary
rules: Should be pure (only one type, not mixed)
Should be supported by Wealth star
Should not be harmed by Hurting Officer

妻星_Wife_Star.note: For men: Direct Wealth (正财) is the primary wife star, Indirect Wealth (偏财) is secondary
rules: Should be supported by Resource star
Should not be robbed by Peer stars

夫妻宫_Spouse_Palace.note: The Earthly Branch of the Day Pillar - the 'home' of the spouse in the chart

positive.纯_Pure: Single husband star type, no mixing
positive.和_Harmonious: Day Master gentle, balanced with husband star
positive.清_Clean: Clear distinction between officer and killing stars
positive.贵_Noble: Officer star supported by wealth, with nobleman stars

negative.滥_Overflowing: Too many husband stars, excessive desires
negative.娼_Harlot: Self too strong, husband star defeated, excessive talent star
negative.淫_Lustful: Multiple visible and hidden husband stars
